overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk video game showing a character walking through a neon-lit futuristic downtown street at dusk. The scene features towering buildings with holographic advertisements, moderate futuristic vehicle traffic, and pedestrians on rain-slicked sidewalks.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city sidewalk alongside neon tram station

events.description: futuristic white delivery van drives past on the left side of the street
character passes the white van and continues walking forward

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk next to a tram line with pink neon lighting

notable_agents.action: white boxy delivery van driving past on the multi-lane street
pedestrian in dark clothing walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall cylindrical building covered in rotating holographic advertisements and bright neon lights
futuristic tram station structure with prominent pink neon strip lighting and glass panels
multi-story building with green neon signage and red structural elements
elevated transit walkway with green and red neon signage reading WAITING CENTER

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic cyberpunk city street at dusk, with the camera following a character walking along a wet concrete sidewalk. A cylindrical tower covered in holographic advertisements dominates the center distance, while a neon-lit tram station runs along the right side. A white delivery van passes by on the left as the character walks forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy downtown sidewalk approaching major intersection

events.description: red futuristic sedan drives past on the street
crowd density increases as approaching the intersection with more pedestrians visible

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk alongside other pedestrians, approaching the intersection ahead

notable_agents.action: red sedan with futuristic design driving past on the street
pedestrian in white and black jacket walking ahead in same direction

entered.detail: building with large purple neon HOTEL signage and multiple stories
elevated concrete walkway crossing above the street ahead with support pillars

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking through the downtown area, passing more pedestrians as the crowd density increases. The cylindrical ad tower moves closer to the center of view while a building with prominent purple HOTEL signage appears on the left. An overhead pedestrian bridge becomes visible in the distance as the character approaches the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching intersection with construction area on right

events.description: teal colored futuristic sedan drives past on the left
camera briefly turns right to look at the tram station wall before reorienting forward

agents.ego_description: walking alongside other pedestrians with the tram station on the right, approaching the crosswalk area

notable_agents.action: teal sedan with glowing accents driving past on the multi-lane street
pedestrian in red vest walking on the sidewalk near the tram station

entered.detail: orange and white striped construction barriers and scaffolding near the tram station

segments.scene_description: The character continues toward the intersection, walking past a construction area marked by orange barriers on the right. The cylindrical ad tower shifts to the left side of the frame as the character moves forward. A teal futuristic car passes by on the street, and the camera briefly turns to show the tram station's neon-lit wall before continuing forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection crosswalk with wide street crossing

events.description: character steps from sidewalk onto the marked crosswalk to cross the street

agents.ego_description: walking onto the crosswalk and beginning to cross the multi-lane street toward the intersection center

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in purple jacket crossing the street ahead of the character

entered.detail: broad yellow striped pedestrian crossing lines painted on the asphalt street
open area of the major intersection with multiple crossing paths and traffic signals

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the intersection and steps onto the yellow-striped crosswalk, beginning to cross the wide multi-lane street. The cylindrical ad tower recedes into the left distance as the character moves into the open intersection area. Other pedestrians are visible crossing in different directions as the character proceeds toward the center of the intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit cyberpunk downtown that transitions from a crowded sidewalk into a wide, open city intersection. It begins by following a character along a wet concrete sidewalk past a neon-lit tram station and a white delivery van, with a massive cylindrical holographic tower dominating the distant center. As the character advances, the crowd density increases and the scene expands to reveal a purple hotel sign on the left and an overhead pedestrian bridge ahead. The camera then glides past orange construction barriers and a passing teal futuristic car, briefly panning toward the tram station's glowing walls before the cylindrical tower shifts toward the left of the frame. Finally, the character steps onto a yellow-striped crosswalk and moves into the open multi-lane intersection, leaving the holographic tower behind in the distance as other pedestrians cross the street.
